name: Cheesecake Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, blend together butter, brown sugar, and flour with a fork until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Set aside 1 cup of this mixture for topping.
3. Press the remaining mixture into an 8x8 inch baking dish. Bake for 15 minutes.
4. In another bowl, combine sugar and cream cheese, mixing until smooth. Thoroughly beat in egg, milk, lemon juice, and vanilla.
5. Spread the mixture over the baked crust and sprinkle with the reserved brown sugar mixture.
6. Bake for an additional 25 minutes.
7. Allow to cool completely, then chill for at least 1 hour before cutting into 16 squares. Serve.
